description_long: This is a medium-sized yellow onion with a rounded, slightly flattened shape and a dry, papery outer skin. The skin is a mix of golden brown and light tan hues, with some areas partially peeled, revealing the paler flesh beneath. The top of the onion features a twisted, dried stem remnant, while the base is mostly smooth with no visible root tuft. The surface displays subtle ridges and natural blemishes, typical of a mature onion. The overall appearance suggests freshness, with the skin mostly intact and no green shoots emerging. The onion's coloration and texture are consistent with those commonly found in grocery stores or urban markets.
description: A round, golden-brown onion with a papery, partially peeled skin and a dried stem on top. The surface shows natural ridges and blemishes, with no visible roots or green shoots.
description_view_0: The onion is seen with its dried stem twisted at the top and a partially peeled area revealing lighter flesh near the bottom right.
description_view_1: This view highlights more blemishes and a larger peeled section on the lower left, with the stem curving to the left.
description_view_2: The onion appears round and full, with the stem splayed and the skin mostly intact except for a small peeled patch on the left.
description_view_3: The back view shows a smoother, more continuous skin surface with subtle vertical ridges and minimal blemishes.
attribute_bulb_segmentation: The bulb appears as a single continuous structure with subtle vertical ridges; no distinct segments or lobes are clearly visible.
attribute_papery_outer_skin: The papery outer skin is mostly intact, golden brown in color, with some areas partially peeled, especially near the bottom and sides. The texture is dry and flaky.
attribute_root_tuft: No root tuft is present; the base is smooth with no visible roots.
attribute_green_shoot_presence: No green shoots or sprouting stems are visible emerging from the onion.
attribute_location_relative_to_urban_ele: No urban elements or context are visible; the onion appears isolated on a neutral background with no indication of indoor or outdoor placement.
